sysprompt: Output: the same sentence with drug spans wrapped in XML tags.
Tag set (use EXACTLY these four tags):
<drug>    = generic human-approved medicine, e.g. ibuprofen, warfarin.
<brand>   = commercial product name, e.g. Tylenol, Xanax.
<drug_n>  = non-human substance or illicit drug, e.g. heroin, cocaine.
- Preserve the input character-by-character; the ONLY allowed change is inserting tags.
- No nested tags. No new tag names. No explanations.
- Output the tagged sentence, then stop.
usrprompt: Tag drugs in this sentence with <drug|group|brand|drug_n>...</...>. Return the tagged sentence only.
